text: Look, I get that some of y’all are obsessed with The Rise of Skywalker, but can we admit the plot is just a messy fanfiction fever dream? It’s like they threw every half-baked idea into a blender and called it a finale. The story stumbles harder than a drunk Stormtrooper. Y’all can’t seriously think this ties up the saga coherently.

So, Captain Marvel is supposed to be this big feminist statement, huh? Strong woman punches aliens, saves the day, blah blah. Honestly, it’s just a flashy action flick with a "girl power" sticker slapped on. If you’re looking for deep commentary on gender, maybe stick to actual books or something.
Okay, but did you even notice the Palpatine clone nonsense?

Look, I get that Rise of Skywalker tried to wrap up the saga with big "destiny" vibes, but c'mon, the whole "balance of the Force" thing felt like a lazy cop-out. Did anyone actually buy that recycled mumbo jumbo? Eye roll.

Look, I get that you’re all hyped about Joker, but let’s be real—half the hype is just people loving the chaos of it. The movie’s basically a Rorschach test for edgelords. Did it make waves? Sure. But acting like it’s some profound statement on society is a stretch. Maybe watch it again without the rose-colored glasses.
